Keeper of Order ring

Once in a while, the fighter fires fireballs at all enemy fighters that deal 65000 magic damage. When an enemy fighter takes damage from the fireball, the ring owner gains a shield that absorbs 15000 damage for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
